patterns.signature: DynamoDB PutItem ProvisionedThroughputExceededException on table pipeline-states
DynamoDB write throttled: pipeline-states consumed WCU exceeds provisioned
ai-memory PutItem throttled, retrying agent checkpoint (attempt <N>)
Admin API HTTP 5xx: AI Teammate request 500

note: ai-agent-svc has the HIGHEST count (7400) because it RETRIES on every throttle (retry amplification) and is what PAGED. But ai-memory-svc's DynamoDB-throttle pattern has the EARLIEST first_seen (07:31:10), before the agent's retries (07:33:20) and platform-api's 5xx (07:36:10). The agent's huge count is amplification of a downstream throttle; first_seen + the dependency direction reveal ai-memory-svc.
